name: Apple Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FILLING----------------------------------
2 cups Apples, thinly sliced
1/2 cup Brown sugar
1/4 cup Dark molasses
3 tbsp Brandy (cognac)
3 Eggs
1 cup Pecans, chopped
1/4 cup Butter
1/4 cup Light corn syrup
2 tbsp Lemon juice
1/4 tsp Nutmeg
Crust: Sift baking powder together. Make a well in the center and add sugar, vanilla, and eggs. Mix in some of the flour from the sides to form a paste.
Cut the butter into small pieces and distribute around the top of the paste. Cover with the remaining flour and knead all ingredients until the dough is smooth.
Divide the dough into two balls and refrigerate, covered until firm enough to handle (about 30 minutes).
Roll out as usual and line the bottom of a 10-inch pie plate.
Filling: Cream butter and sugar until smooth. Add eggs, one at a time. Stir in molasses, corn syrup, brandy, and lemon juice. Fold in apples and pecans; stir thoroughly.
Pour into pastry-lined pie plate. Sprinkle with nutmeg over all. Cover with lattice crust (optional) and bake at 350°F until crust is golden brown and filling is bubbly, about 35-45 minutes.
Serve warm, topped with vanilla ice cream or whipped cream. Optionally cover the bottom with grated cheese before baking.
